title: Reis body origin
wikitext:
[]: Rei's body origin             Quote Post by Knuckles » Sat Sep 17, 2011 1:51 pm So I've been reading the wiki a lot, and what I've gathered from the Episode 23 stills is that Unit 01 was made directly from Lilith, possibly explaining the absence of Lilith's legs. It's also stated somewhere that Rei (and also her bodies, one would assume) was made from this same substance. This would also infer Kaworu is made directly from Adam. Now what I'm confused about is whether Rei's body was formed DIRECTLY from the Lilith being, or if it was taken from Unit 01, who was taken directly from Lilith. A kind of theory I thought up is that Rei's appearance might be based on Yui because of Unit 01's soul. This can be easily debunked, by either Rei not being made from Unit 01, or Rei being made before Yui's contact experiment, or the fact that she smells like Shinji's mother and souls dont transfer smells. In any case, if those stills are to be believed, at best, Rei is mostly made of Lilith. Taking that book's words into consideration, that Rei was formed by the 'salvaged remains of Yui', I'm thinking they took like a pinky toe and put it inside the Lilith/Rei blob, giving it its Yui-clone appearance. 'Salvaged remains' is such a vague term. Discuss? (Sorry if there have been threads like this, I did a search and it came up fruitless)

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Sep 17, 2011 2:09 pm There's some discussion of genetics here: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=9340

[]:             Quote Post by Knuckles » Sat Sep 17, 2011 9:21 pm Thanks =] I read through that thread and basically what I got was that everything is unclear and up to speculation lol, including whether or not you think she's biologically related to Shinji. In that case, I suggest changing the Rei Ayanami wiki page, it directly states that she's a 'clone of Yui Ikari', and that that has been stated in the series as fact.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Sep 17, 2011 11:26 pm We don't know her exact genetic makeup or whether she's composed of normal or 'wave particle' matter, but she definately in some sense is a clone of Yui. What would be the point of chaging the wiki just to make things even more complicated for noobs?

[]:             Quote Post by Knuckles » Sun Sep 18, 2011 12:24 am Because the wiki doesn't mention anything about Lilith in that statement. "Rei is a clone of Yui Ikari." That's all it says, like inferring she's 100% a clone. Then it says on a different page Rei was made from the Lilith being along with Unit-01. Very confusing.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Sun Sep 18, 2011 12:44 am NemZ wrote: We don't know her exact genetic makeup or whether she's composed of normal or 'wave particle' matter, but she definately in some sense is a clone of Yui. What would be the point of chaging the wiki just to make things even more complicated for noobs?

[]:             Quote Post by Knuckles » Sun Sep 18, 2011 12:56 am Btw Nemz, I saw your post from last year: Rei is genetically his mom, socially his friend/coworker/classmate, legally his sister, spiritually the progenitor of the entire 'normal' biosphere, physically a mass of matter that ought not be, and technically (depending on which Rei we're talking about) also some form of the risen dead. ...and I still like Shinji/Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Sep 18, 2011 1:13 am Knuckles wrote: Very confusing.

[]:             Quote Post by Knuckles » Sun Sep 18, 2011 1:24 am NemZ wrote: That's what the Theory and Analysis pages are for.

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Sun Sep 18, 2011 12:35 pm Knuckles wrote: In that case, I suggest changing the Rei Ayanami wiki page, it directly states that she's a 'clone of Yui Ikari', and that that has been stated in the series as fact.

[]:             Quote Post by pen-pen » Sun Sep 18, 2011 9:30 pm Now I'm more confused than ever......

[]:             Quote Post by ShIiNjI » Mon Sep 19, 2011 3:32 am There's no doubt that Rei is a clone of Yui. We're almost sure that Kaworu have been made also form Adam's flesh, thus probably Rei have been made also from Lilith's flesh. Rei contains (a part of) Lilith's soul.
